refutationAttempt: Tried to read 1998 as a defensible reissue year and the DNA as pure editorial; but the claim is the verb 'Recorded in 1998', which is a checkable date, not opinion.
decision: Upheld: MB gives the original release date as 1962, and a recording cannot postdate its own original release, so 'Recorded in 1998' is contradicted by the 1962 date.

refutationAttempt: Hardest to uphold: only one year off (1957 vs 1956), both in the correct Cool Jazz era, so this could be a trivial typo rather than the reissue-date disease.
decision: Upheld narrowly: MB dates both the release and the release group to 1956; a 1956 release cannot have been recorded in 1957 (recording precedes release), so the year claim is contradicted by the evidence.

refutationAttempt: Tried to treat 2007 as merely the bonus-track reissue year cited in the prose; but ours states the album was 'Recorded in 2007', a factual recording-year claim.
decision: Upheld: the entity-matched Wikipedia page states the album was released in 1962 and recorded live June 25, 1962, directly contradicting a 2007 recording.
contradictingQuote: Full House is an album by the jazz guitarist Wes Montgomery, released in 1962.

refutationAttempt: Tried to read the DNA as opinion and 1990 as the matched-release date; but 'Recorded in 1990' is a date claim and the matched 1990 release is a CD reissue, not the original.
decision: Upheld: MB release-group first release is 1956; the album cannot have been recorded in 1990 when it first appeared in 1956.
